steps: Incubate dissected larvae with 200 mM chlorpromazine (Sigma) in Schneider medium for 30 min at room temperature. 00:30:00
Rinse the samples with 0 mM Ca 2+ HL-3 solution. (1/3)
Rinse the samples with 0 mM Ca 2+ HL-3 solution. (2/3)
Rinse the samples with 0 mM Ca 2+ HL-3 solution. (3/3)

Stimulate the samples with a solution of 90 mM K + /2 mM Ca 2+ /200 mM chlorpromazine (25 mM NaCl, 90 mM KCl, 10 mM MgCl 2 , 10 mM NaHCO 3 , 5 mM trehalose, 5 mM HEPES (pH 7.2), 30 mM sucrose, 2 mM CaCl 2 and 200 mM chlorpromazine) in the presence of 4 μM fixable FM1-43 for 10 min. 00:10:00
Fix larval fillets in 4% paraformaldehyde/1XPBS solution for 10 min. 00:10:00
Wash the fixative out by rinsing with 1XPBS solution. (1/3)
Wash the fixative out by rinsing with 1XPBS solution. (2/3)
Wash the fixative out by rinsing with 1XPBS solution. (3/3)

Mount the samples with glycerol-containing mounting medium. Bulk membranous invaginations were defined as the internalized structures labeled with high levels of FM1-43 dye. The area of individual type Ib boutons and bulk membranous invaginations were counted using Image J.
creator: Chi-Kuang Yao
